items.question: Are your products 100% antibiotic-free?
items.answer: Yes. We never use antibiotics, growth hormones, or artificial chemicals on any of our animals. Our livestock builds immunity naturally through open pasture living and clean, natural feed.

items.question: How do I place an order?
items.answer: You can order directly via WhatsApp, phone call, or email. We deliver fresh within Goa. Contact details are in the footer below.

items.question: What is the difference between desi eggs and commercial eggs?
items.answer: Our desi eggs come from free-range country chickens and contain 3x more omega-3 fatty acids, higher vitamin E, deeper orange yolks, and no synthetic hormones — unlike caged commercial eggs.

items.question: Do you offer home delivery?
items.answer: Yes, we deliver across Goa. Minimum order quantities may apply. Please WhatsApp or call us to confirm delivery areas and availability.

items.question: What native breeds do you raise?
items.answer: We raise Kadaknath, Srinidhi, Sonali, Gramapriya, Brahma, Frizzle Feather, Kaveri, and Aseel Peruvudai chickens; Californian, Grey Giant, New Zealand White/Black, Soviet Chinchilla, Black Giant, and Dutch rabbits; and Osmanabadi and Konkan Kanyal goats.
